# 🎤 Artist Overview  
Vozz Rich is a dynamic US-based producer and DJ whose music is a vibrant fusion of house, techno, salsa, and big room influences. With roots in Mexico and California, he brings a multicultural flair to his tracks, creating infectious beats that resonate on dancefloors worldwide. Known for his high-energy remixes and original productions, Vozz Rich has collaborated with artists like L25, Artsychoke, and Jaytor, steadily building a reputation as a rising star in the electronic music scene. His ability to blend genres and craft memorable melodies has garnered attention from underground raves to mainstream playlists.  

# 📊 Performance & Draw  
- **Streaming Growth**: Vozz Rich has seen consistent growth on Spotify, with monthly listeners peaking at over 37,000. His tracks continue to gain traction, showcasing a steady upward trend.  
- **Social Media Engagement**: With 4,875 Instagram followers and 4,109 Spotify followers, Vozz Rich maintains an engaged and growing fanbase.  
- **Geographic Popularity**: His music resonates strongly in the US, with significant listenership in California and emerging popularity in Latin America.  

# 🎧 Recent Releases & Press  
- **Featured Tracks**:  
  - *Breathless* (with L25) — July 2024  
  - *Don’t Want It to End* (Remixes by Kicevski, Pillars, and PYM) — August 2024  
  - *Butterflies Remix* (with Artsychoke) — May 2024  
- **Remix Work**:  
  - *Dance All Night* (Jaytor) — August 2024  
  - *Sofi Disco* (Paul Parker) — October 2024  
- **Playlist Inclusions**: Featured on curated Spotify playlists in the house and dance categories, amplifying his reach and engagement.  

# 🎪 Stage Experience & Technical  
- **Performance Style**: Vozz Rich delivers high-energy DJ sets that blend his original tracks with expertly curated remixes, ensuring a memorable and dance-driven experience.  
- **Technical Rider**: Available upon request, tailored to venue requirements to ensure seamless performances.  
- **Past Events**: While still emerging, Vozz Rich has performed at underground raves and local club events, steadily building his live performance portfolio.

With a unique blend of cultural influences and a growing catalog of electrifying tracks, Vozz Rich is poised to make waves in the electronic music scene. Book him for your next event and experience the energy firsthand!
